## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code change with no new feature or bug fix
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] `test` — Tests only
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — Build, CI, or tooling change

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (`php artisan test --compact tests/...`)
- [ ] All tests pass locally
- [ ] `vendor/bin/pint --dirty` run (no style violations)
- [ ] Migration added if schema changed
- [ ] `docs/DECISIONS.md` updated if this is an architectural decision
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
